Upcoming Events

Professional Events

Study Sessions

Every Thursday in Spring 2026 Semester | 01:00 – 03:00 PM
Location: 120 Fogler Library

Open to graduate students and undergraduates (Chi Epsilon, ASCE). Study sessions will include FE prep, homework review, and exam preparation.

View Flyer

Geo-Congress Conference 2026

March 9, 2026 | 08:00 AM - 04:00 PM
Location: Salt Lake City, Utah, USA

Description of this event.

Drone Training Workshop

Tentative Timeline: April–May 2026 Location: University Mall, University of Maine

Technical seminar on drone applications in geotechnical and coastal engineering will be held 4 weeks prior to the flying workshop. GSO and COPRI will coordinate licensing for participants.

Liquefaction Tank

Completion by May 2026
Location: Advanced Geotechnical Lab, Boardman Hall, University of Maine

Final construction and demonstration planning underway.

Data Analysis Workshop

September 18, 2026 | 01:00 – 03:00 PM
Location: 312 Boardman Hall, University of Maine

Data analysis session (1–3 PM). Potential collaboration with S.W. Cole and integration with CE 460.

Faculty Interview Series

Spotlight featuring faculty and their research groups.

To be shared on website and social media.

GSO Website Development

Ongoing improvements. Member input and design suggestions welcome.

CIE Department New Member Seminar

February 4, 2026 | 03:30 – 05:00 PM
Location: 115 Boardman Hall

Description of this event.

Location: Rec Center Trails, University of Maine

February Happy Hour

CIE End of Year Celebration

May 15, 2026 | 04:00 PM
Location: University Mall in front of Boardman Hall, University of Maine

Collaboration with ASCE, CIE Department, COPRI, and Chi Epsilon.

Hike & Lunch in Acadia

May 23, 2026 | 10:00 AM
Location: Seal Harbor, ME 04675

Jordan Pond trail head and doing the Jordan Pond loop followed by lunch at Jordan Pond House.

Pushaw Dam Paddling

June 20, 2026 | 10:00 AM
Location: Hirundo Wildlife Refuge, Old Town, ME

Group paddle to Pushaw Dam and social gathering.

Beach Day

July 24, 2026 | 09:00 AM
Location: Ogunquit Beach

Day trip to Ogunquit Beach. Optional overnight stay depending on group interest.

Treworgy Family Orchard

August 15, 2026 | 10:00 AM
Location: 3876 Union St, Levant, ME 04456

Visit to Treworgy orchards including seasonal activities and corn maze.
